headline: Chipotle invests in 6 more emerging companies
summary: They are part of the fast-casual chain’s Cultivate Next venture fund to support entrepreneurs working to solve challenges in agriculture, supply chains, and technology.

raw.headline: Chipotle invests in 6 more emerging companies

headline: Starbucks Near Its 52-Week High: Can the Stock Sustain the Rally?
summary: SBUX is nearing its 52-week high as stronger traffic, loyalty growth and turnaround efforts keep investors focused on the next move.

raw.headline: Starbucks Near Its 52-Week High: Can the Stock Sustain the Rally?

headline: Chipotle drives rewards program with ‘PGA Tour 2K25’ integration
summary: The partnership is part of a larger golf strategy by the brand, which became an official sponsor of PGA Tour through a multiyear deal announced in January.

raw.headline: Chipotle drives rewards program with ‘PGA Tour 2K25’ integration
